current_gate: Hold main at c4600472; use audited C0.4F-A head 21388c0 as the base for M1 so the incomplete layer-separation state is not merged alone

orchestration_mode.durable_memory: GitHub exact refs, worker status files, current state and append-only orchestration event log
orchestration_mode.rule: Never rely on chat memory alone; verify and record exact refs before decisions
orchestration_mode.owner_speed_directive: Build one bounded Codex milestone at a time. Present the next exact scope to the Owner before creating or dispatching its contract. No routine extra audit loop.
orchestration_mode.limit_awareness: Local worker execution is not observable until status/branch/head evidence is pushed

c0_4f_a.title: Runtime layer separation and essential Boundary strokes
c0_4f_a.meaning_of_verdict: The one-commit layer-separation scope is technically safe and architecture-compliant; it does not mean the complete user-facing settings workflow is finished
c0_4f_a.merge_policy: Do not merge this head alone while known appearance controls remain incomplete. Base M1 directly on this audited head and merge the combined usable result later.

architecture.connection_rule: Connection is not a seventh Organism target

dispatch_rule.before_each_milestone: Assistant presents exact visible changes, moves/removals, exclusions, branch and acceptance checks; Owner may add changes
dispatch_rule.authorization: Only explicit Owner GO creates the final contract and Codex launch prompt
dispatch_rule.completion: Codex stops at WAITING_REVIEW; Assistant verifies GitHub evidence; Owner explicitly approves merge or correction
dispatch_rule.audit: No separate audit by default unless a BLOCKER/HIGH-risk contradiction appears

antigravity.symbol_research_status: MAPPED INTO M2, M5, M6, M7 AND CUSTOM-SYMBOL MILESTONE

locked_sequence: Assistant presents M1 exact scope to Owner
Owner adds/removes requirements and says GO CODEX M1
Codex creates feature/c0-m1-layer-editing-recovery from exact audited head 21388c0d
Codex completes M1 and stops at WAITING_REVIEW
Assistant verifies the combined C0.4F-A plus M1 feature head
Owner explicitly approves merge of the combined usable result to main
After merge, Assistant presents M2 Symbol Registry and Inspector before dispatch
protected: main without explicit Owner merge approval
Master Graph/store as sole data source
audit branches must never be merged
research branches must never be merged wholesale into main
UI-command icons remain separate from drawable symbols
Rejected and unverified symbol assets remain excluded
Selection UI must never persist or export
